GPU_CATALOG.name: NVIDIA P100
GPU_CATALOG.supplyHint: Stable early supply; a safe baseline for the first years.
GPU_CATALOG.description: Pascal generation accelerator widely used in the first modern AI clusters.

GPU_CATALOG.name: NVIDIA V100
GPU_CATALOG.supplyHint: Widely available at first, but large orders create queue pressure.
GPU_CATALOG.description: Volta generation accelerator with first-generation tensor cores.

GPU_CATALOG.name: NVIDIA A100
GPU_CATALOG.supplyHint: High-demand datacenter part with moderate lead times.
GPU_CATALOG.description: Ampere era workhorse for GPT-3-scale training.

GPU_CATALOG.name: NVIDIA H100
GPU_CATALOG.supplyHint: Frontier demand keeps this model on allocation.
GPU_CATALOG.description: Hopper accelerator tuned for transformer-heavy frontier workloads.

GPU_CATALOG.name: NVIDIA L40S
GPU_CATALOG.supplyHint: Balanced supply and useful for inference or light training.
GPU_CATALOG.description: Practical mid-tier accelerator with more VRAM than consumer cards.

GPU_CATALOG.name: NVIDIA B200
GPU_CATALOG.description: Blackwell-era accelerator designed for frontier-scale training.

GPU_CATALOG.name: NVIDIA GB200
GPU_CATALOG.supplyHint: System-level rollout with very limited early supply.
GPU_CATALOG.description: Rack-scale frontier hardware for late-game training and deployment.

GPU_CATALOG.name: Google TPU v3
GPU_CATALOG.supplyHint: Cloud-only TPU access depends on Google quota and region.
GPU_CATALOG.description: Cloud-only TPU pod slice optimized for Google infrastructure.

GPU_CATALOG.name: Google TPU v4
GPU_CATALOG.supplyHint: Cloud-only and quota gated, but excellent for efficient training.
GPU_CATALOG.description: Large-scale cloud TPU generation specialized for LLM workloads.

GPU_CATALOG.name: AMD MI300X
GPU_CATALOG.supplyHint: Strong memory capacity but still a niche supply chain.
GPU_CATALOG.description: High-VRAM AMD accelerator that offers a strong NVIDIA alternative.

GPU_CATALOG.name: NVIDIA Rubin
GPU_CATALOG.supplyHint: Projected late-game hardware with extremely tight availability.
GPU_CATALOG.description: Future frontier GPU for long-horizon 2027+ play.
